@here The Atlas Brew #31 - Video Game Survey is starting in 5 minutes! 

Join us at the ⁠🔊┃Atlas Brew Lounge   

This week’s topic is the Video Game Survey (https://forms.gle/BH8eGP9nqCkJ9UwJ9): what are the most common answers, what does the community want to see, what excites people the most about blockchain games and more!
